markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.051 — Disclosure of Certain Information Prohibited

The department may not disclose class-type listings from the basic driver’s license record file to any person except as provided by Section 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), regardless of whether the requestor is eligible to receive the information under Chapter 730 (Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 10, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
